name: owasp-security-audit-marketplace
description: Marketplace for owasp-security-audit: OWASP Top 10 (2025) application security audit with stack-aware scanning, approved runtime checks, and actionable reports.

plugins.name: owasp-security-audit
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10 (2025) application security audit. Stack-aware scanning for injection, access control, auth, secrets, SSRF, and more. Docker-aware runtime checks only with your approval. Structured report with severity, Quick Wins, and concrete fixes. No invented findings; secrets always masked.
